body.gate: T-ticket-schema-decision-id-and-gate AND T-decided-skill must ship first
body.title: Decision rollup — auto-close decision when all its tickets close; un-gate dependents
body.result: Added _decision_rollup() to cc_queue.py: invoked by cmd_done. When a ticket closes and all siblings w/ same decision_id are done/discarded/blocked, writes rollup to lab/design_docs/decisions/<D-id>.md listing shipped tickets + their results; un-gates any ticket whose gate text mentions this decision_id. File-stub location until T-decisions-into-palace-subtree migrates rollups into the palace. Smoke-tested via T-stale-ticket-sweeper close (no rollup fired — decision has open siblings, expected).
body.description:
Closes the learning loop: decisions in the palace are frozen promises without feedback; rollup adds the outcome.

## Trigger
When /sprint-batch or /sprint closes a ticket AND that ticket has decision_id, check: are all tickets with this decision_id now done/discarded? If yes, roll up.

## Rollup action
- Update Igor palace node theigors/decisions/D### with:
  - status: closed
  - outcome: 'shipped via T-x, T-y; actual vs planned: …'
  - closed_at timestamp
- Write a short line to the decisions log
- Scan queue.json for tickets with `gate` matching this decision's milestone; clear those gates (un-gate)

## Blocked by
- T-ticket-schema-decision-id-and-gate
- T-decided-skill (decisions need to exist and be linked)

## Not in scope
- /review self-learning — separate ticket.
